name: rank64_nkeys8_dclamp997_exp018
hypothesis: exp010 (n_keys=8) diverged at the unstable clamp 0.999, so we never saw whether harder retrieval load can force emergence when stable. The priors flag a residual_rank x n_keys interaction: max exact buffer (rank 64) holds more bindings, and with n_keys=8 under real retrieval pressure at the STABLE clamp 0.997 (exp009: skip 0.036), the model has maximum capacity + harder task + stability. If tokacc climbs past 0.30 the capacity x difficulty interaction was the missing ingredient (falsifies the structural diagnosis, reopens the search); if flat the plateau is fundamental regardless of capacity.
